sizing_rule.note: Position size determined by optimal f adjusted for intercorrelations and market weightings across multiple systems. Only trade when volatility exceeds minimum threshold. Formula: f_adjusted = f_value / market_weighting. Specific optimal f value and volatility threshold not provided by author.

source_rule_text: Trade only in markets whose volatility exceeds a certain threshold, and use optimal f values adjusted for intercorrelations and weightings across multiple market systems to maximize geometric growth.
